Trails.Name: Lower Wanderer, West Meadows, Mike's Way
Old Log Rd, West Meadows, Mike's Way
Sun Bowl, Home Run, 91, Main Base Area

_inspectorSnowReport.Report:
3/7 5:45AM - Let’s Weekend! For your Saturday, you’ll have 99 trails to play on, with our grooming team dressing up a whopping 82 of those trails in corduroy overnight. Alongside, we plan on spinning 13 lifts but please note, due to icing and high winds, delays are expected. Please call (802)297-INFO this morning to see if early access is a go. We have lots going on this weekend from the Ski the East X Long Trail Apres party at the Sunbowl to the 2026 NorAm Cup taking place on World Cup. Have fun, play and I'll ski ya out there!

Safety Tip: Slow down when entering the lift mazes. 

The 2026 FIS Freestyle Ski NorAm Cup is going down this Saturday and Sunday on World Cup! Spectators are welcome to hike up Old Log Road (free of charge) or ski down to the Snow Bowl lift. If hiking, snowshoes are recommended and can be rented at First Run Ski Shop in the Village. Not able to make it? Watch the event live via the Snow Bowl Webcam. Welcome and good luck to all of the competitors!
